Codebasics Foundation
Make Their Life Beautiful | Knowledge Base Document 1: About the Foundation
Who We Are
Codebasics Foundation is a nonprofit organization based in Hyderabad, India, making people's
lives beautiful through direct, experience driven giving. We believe there is something sacred in
every human life. When you reach out and truly see another person, something quiet and profound
shifts within you.
We work with orphanages and shelters to bring children life skills, confidence, and real world
learning. In India, millions of children grow up in institutions where they have a roof and they get
meals, but most of them leave without the skills and confidence needed to build an independent
life. Codebasics Foundation was started to change that. We believe this starts with one orphanage
at a time, one child at a time, building proof that deep, sustained engagement changes lives.
Our Mission
To bring love, education, and protection to children who need it most, consistently and with dignity.
Every program is built around one idea: children deserve more than survival. Every child deserves
a good education, health care, and love.
Our Founders and Their Stories
Three different journeys. One shared belief: education changes everything.
Dhaval Patel, Co-founder
Dhaval grew up in a small village where staying in school was a daily fight. Not because he didn't
want to learn, but because the money wasn't always there. He remembers walking past other kids
who had already dropped out, knowing he could easily be one of them. He made it through, built a
career in technology, and created Codebasics. But that walk to school never left him. He made a
point: no child should have to fight that hard just to learn. In his words: "My heart goes out for less
fortunate children and this foundation exists as a helping hand to reach out to them."
Hemanand Vadivel, Co-founder
Hemanand's path to education came with its own set of hurdles. Getting to school, staying in
school, and finding a way forward were never guaranteed. He built a career in data analytics
across Europe, but the gap he experienced growing up never stopped bothering him. When
Dhaval shared the idea for the foundation, it wasn't a hard decision. He works to make sure other
children don't have to wonder what their life would have looked like with a little more support at the
right time. In his words: "Everyone sees children begging on the street but only a few care about

bringing them out of begging and providing them a sustainable life. We want to be among that
few."
Manisha, Co-founder and Finance Lead
Manisha grew up in a joint family of 17 cousins. Being a girl child meant she still had to fight for her
education. Nothing was handed to her. She earned her way into finance and built real expertise,
the kind you develop when you know the value of every rupee. At the foundation, she handles the
money with complete transparency. Every donation is tracked. Every expense is justified. In her
words: "I found my life's purpose with Codebasics and then it got extended to Codebasics
Foundation. I love spending my energy to make this world a better place."
All three founders had to fight for their education in different ways. That shared experience is the
foundation of this foundation. They know what it feels like, and they don't want any child to go
through it alone.
Our Programs at a Glance
Program
What It Does
CF Aarambh
Monthly skill workshops for orphanage children covering communication,
confidence, careers, and life skills. Every child deserves a beginning.
Street to School
Children begging at traffic signals deserve a classroom, not a street corner.
We identify children who want to learn, talk to their families, handle school
admission, cover school costs, and run regular check-ins to make sure every
child keeps going to school.
Healthcare Support (with
IBD India)
Partnering with IBD India to fund treatment for patients with Inflammatory
Bowel Disease who cannot afford care. IBD India refers patients in need,
donations cover treatments and medicines, and patients get care without
financial burden.
VAN of Love
A full day giving back trip in Hyderabad. Book a seat, paint classrooms, share
gifts with children, cook meals together, and carry home a memento to
remember the day.
Built on Transparency and Accountability
We hold ourselves accountable to every person who trusts us with their generosity. Your
contribution reaches people directly. Every rupee is accounted for, and we share exactly where it
went and what it made possible. There are no intermediaries. Your generosity reaches people
directly, and we share their stories back with you. Every photograph we publish captures a real
day, a real exchange between people who chose to show up for one another.

All donations are eligible for tax deduction under Section 80G of the Income Tax Act. Every
contribution is tracked and accounted for, with direct updates so donors know exactly where their
support went.
Contact Information
Email: info@codebasicsfoundation.org
Website: https://codebasicsfoundation.org
Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India
Whether you have a question, a suggestion, or simply want to connect, we read every message
and respond personally.

1U-7IYfNoVGMbg7AedJBJo7JIhxQVdsSX.extracted_text:
Ways to Contribute
Codebasics Foundation | Knowledge Base Document 2: Contributions, Volunteering, and Donations
This is not about transactions. It is about showing up, offering what you have, and discovering that the giving itself is the gift. Every story behind our work started with someone who cared enough to show up. If any of this moves you, there is a place for you here.
1. Donate
Your contribution reaches people directly. Every rupee is accounted for, and we share exactly where it went and what it made possible. Every contribution is traceable. We show you exactly who it reached and what it made possible.
How to Donate (India)
Online via our website at codebasicsfoundation.org, processed securely through Razorpay.
UPI: scan the QR code on the website and pay via any UPI app (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM, and others). After paying via UPI QR, share the UPI Transaction ID from your payment app on the donation form so we can verify and confirm.
You can choose which program your donation supports: CF Aarambh, Street to School, Healthcare Support (IBD India partnership), or wherever the need is greatest.
How to Donate (International Donors)
We are setting up international payment options. For now, international donors should email info@codebasicsfoundation.org with the message that they would like to make an international donation, and our team will share bank transfer details and help complete the donation.
80G Tax Benefits and Receipts
All donations are eligible for tax deduction under Section 80G of the Income Tax Act, India.
Donors must provide their full name (required for the 80G receipt) and PAN in the format ABCDE1234F (5 letters, 4 digits, 1 letter).
When you pay online, your 80G receipt is emailed automatically within 3 working days.
For UPI QR payments, after the payment is confirmed, the 80G tax receipt is emailed within 3 working days.
Donors receive a confirmation email shortly after donating, and we later share the impact of the donation.
What We Store and Privacy
Donations are processed through Razorpay and UPI. We store the donation amount, currency, and transaction reference for record keeping and receipts. We do not store card details, bank account numbers, or UPI PIN. Only the Codebasics Foundation admin team has access to donor data, and information is never sold, rented, or shared with third parties for marketing.
2. Volunteer
Teach a skill, capture moments on camera, help at events, or simply lend a hand. Whatever you bring, it finds its purpose here. Volunteers offer their time, their skills, and their presence.
Ways to Volunteer
Teach a skill: lead sessions for orphanage children in our CF Aarambh workshops, covering communication, confidence, careers, and life skills. Volunteers with backgrounds in technology, data, design, public speaking, fitness, or arts are all welcome.
Photography and videography: capture real moments during trips and workshops so the stories can be shared with supporters.
Help at events: assist with logistics, coordination, and on the ground support during workshops, VAN of Love trips, and community drives.
Lend a hand: even without a specific skill, volunteers can join activities, spend time with children, and support the team.
How to Sign Up as a Volunteer
Fill the volunteer form on codebasicsfoundation.org. Share a little about yourself and what draws you to this work: what you bring, which programs interest you, and how you would like to contribute. You can rank your contribution preferences. When there is an opportunity that fits, the team reaches out. Volunteers agree to share their details with Codebasics Foundation for volunteering purposes as per the privacy policy.
3. VAN of Love Trips
Book a seat and spend a full day giving back in Hyderabad. Activities include painting classrooms, sharing gifts with children, cooking meals together, and carrying home a memento to remember the day. Seats are limited per trip, so booking in advance through the website is required. This is the easiest first step for anyone who wants to experience the foundation's work directly.
4. Support a Program

5. Frequently Asked Questions
Is my donation tax deductible?
Yes. All donations are eligible for tax deduction under Section 80G of the Income Tax Act. Provide your full name and PAN when donating, and the receipt is emailed within 3 working days.
How do I know my money is used well?
Every contribution is tracked and accounted for. We share direct updates so you know exactly where your support went, including stories and photographs from the ground. There are no intermediaries.
Can I donate from outside India?
Yes, via bank transfer. Email info@codebasicsfoundation.org and the team will share bank transfer details and assist you.
Can I volunteer without a technical skill?
Absolutely. You can help at events, join VAN of Love trips, assist with logistics, or simply spend time with the children. Whatever you bring, it finds its purpose here.
How do I join a VAN of Love trip?
Book a seat on codebasicsfoundation.org. Trips run in Hyderabad and seats are limited, so early booking is recommended.
Who do I contact for anything else?
Email info@codebasicsfoundation.org. We read every message and respond personally.
